case_title: THERESA JOAN HOWARD VS. MARY E CURRY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOWARD, THERESA JOAN AS TO DEFENDANT CURRY, MARY E AN INDIVIDUAL DBA TLC CHILD CARE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
